name: dependency-upgrade
description: Survey, bump, and verify a dependency upgrade with a human review gate before committing.

steps.prompt: Identify the latest stable version of the named dependency. Read the upstream changelog between the current and target versions. List breaking changes, deprecations, and migration steps. Save under .guild/runtime/dependency-upgrade/survey.md.
Update the version in the relevant package.json (or workspace catalog) to the target version. Run the package manager install command. Do not run tests yet.
Run the test suite from the repo root. If a test fails, capture the failure and stop the workflow. Do not auto-fix; the user decides whether to roll back or push a compatibility patch.
Run the typecheck command from the repo root. If type errors appear that are attributable to the upgrade, capture the locations and stop the workflow.
Show the diff and the test/typecheck results. The user will confirm before committing.
Create a single commit with a chore: bump <name> to <version> message. Include the survey.md path in the commit body for traceability.
